title: Omega Traps
description: this mod adds two amazing items that you can prank ur friends with. try putting weak leaves on a hole and lure ur friend above it and see what happens!!!
body: the omega traps mod adds two pranking items, weak leaves and fake iron block. the weak leveaves is a block that breaks when an entity steps on it. it's used for trapping and pranking your friends. the fake iron block is labled ingame as iron block you can trick friends by making them believe that it's a real one. both items are only obtained through crafting.
